body_excerpt: In createNameCredentialDialog of CertInstaller.java, there exists the possibility of improperly installed certificates due to a logic error. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In createNameCredentialDialog of CertInstaller.java, there exists the possibility of improperly installed certificates due to a logic error. This could lead to remote information disclosure with no ad
